name: kbd
title: Kbd
description: Kbd Component Displays a keyboard key or shortcut indicator. Inspired by shadcn/ui with CSS variable theming support.

props.name: asChild
props.description: When true, renders child element with kbd styling instead of `<kbd>`. Useful for custom elements with keyboard key appearance.

props.name: children
props.description: Children to render inside the kbd element.

props.name: asChild
props.description: When true, renders child element with group styling instead of `<kbd>`.

props.name: children
props.description: Children to render inside the group.
